title: Reports on birth and stillbirth certificates
doc_html:
§1121.23. Reports on birth and stillbirth certificates

            In reporting every birth and stillbirth, physicians and others required to make the reports shall state on the certificate whether a standard test for syphilis has been made upon a specimen of blood taken from the woman who bore the child for which a birth or stillbirth certificate is filed.

            Redesignated from R.S. 40:1093 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1121.23.  Reports on birth and stillbirth certificates
In reporting every birth and stillbirth, physicians and others required to make the
reports shall state on the certificate whether a standard test for syphilis has been made upon
a specimen of blood taken from the woman who bore the child for which a birth or stillbirth
certificate is filed.
Redesignated from R.S. 40:1093 by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
